stories.title: Spain's persistence pays off to win 2026 World Cup...
stories.summary: So that's it! The 2026 World Cup is over and Spain have been crowned champions. Here's how they won it, how Argentina lost it, and everything in between.

stories.title: In a tournament dominated by superstars, Spain's t...
Spain's Torres on WC winner: 'Destiny was written'...
stories.summary: Spain forward Ferran Torres said "destiny was written" after firing his country to World Cup glory against Argentina.

stories.title: Messi in tears, future unclear after WC final loss...
stories.summary: Lionel Messi was left in tears after he was unable to conjure up one more piece of magic to save Argentina from defeat to Spain in Sunday's World Cup final at MetLife Stadium.

stories.title: France's Mbappé wins Golden Boot ahead of Messi
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé has won the 2026 World Cup Golden Boot with 10 goals after Lionel Messi failed to score in Sunday's final against Spain.
